title: Implement gateway multi-RX support for CCP-14
description: Add support for gateway to receive on multiple LoRa channels simultaneously to support coordinated capacity planning. Update lichen-gateway Rust code and/or Zephyr gateway app to handle multiple RX paths or concurrent radio configs. Include test vectors and update spec if needed. Follow test integrity rules with independent oracles.
close_reason: Implemented multi-RX gateway support via HAL Concentrator trait, SLIP framer multiple RX test, CCP-14 vectors and spec updates. Tests pass, independent oracles used. Matches epic closure.
